'''Levian Two''' was an orange, inhospitable [[Planet/Legends|world]] that was located within the [[Inner Rim/Legends|Inner Rim]] of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]], near [[Warlord/Legends|warlord]] [[Zsinj]]-controlled territory. It was the location of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic's]] [[Beta Sector Base]].

{{Planet-stub}}
